calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Barrie Cowan, Esq.(415-244-9095)for Jonathan Harris, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Daniel Piccinini, Esq.(415-345-8610) for Defendant Alan Schneider, Defendant and moving party.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT ALAN SCHNEIDER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Defendant submits proposed orders, approved by opposing counsel. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

1:15
DEFENDANT ALAN SCHNEIDER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Order is signed by the Court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
